name: sistema-rifas
description: Orquestrador do Monorepo - Comissão de Formatura 2026

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/functions && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npm run dev:back & npm run dev:front
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build:back && npm run build:front
